dispositions.practice_name: JAMES MALINOWSKI DDS. DAVID SEFCIK DDS. LTD
dispositions.rationale: The hard ao_nonclinical_exec_title signal is benign: the authorized official JAMES MALINOWSKI (title TREASURER) is himself a named owner-dentist in the practice name, serving as officer of his own PC. Own website (malinowskisefcik.com) confirms Drs. Malinowski and Sefcik as two co-owning dentists at a single location (903 129th Infantry Dr, Joliet), phone (815) 725-1605 matching, est. 1983, no DSO/corporate parent. provider_count=2 with two surnames is consistent with T2. Tier stands, high.

db_context is large_group with provider_count=7 (6 dentists on the team page), which per rule 1 forbids a clean T2. AO Dr. Shweta Kamal (President) reaches 2 locations and the shared phone reaches a third location, contradicting the single-location claim; the researcher himself notes she also works at a separate Aurora office (Downer Place Dental). Web search confirms Dr. Kamal is a practicing dentist and that the db-attached 'Best Image Dental' is a distinct nearby practice (625 vs 825 Plainfield Rd), so there is no corporate/DSO signal — but T2 (large single office) vs T3 (dentist multi-location) is genuinely unresolved. Not corporate, so hold_unresolved rather than dso_verify.

dispositions.practice_name: DR MARIA OSAN TOPALA AND ASSOC
dispositions.rationale: The hard ao_nonclinical_exec_title signal is benign: KATHY KASPER (INSURANCE COORDINATOR) is an office-staff filer of the org NPI for a dentist-eponymous practice. The practice's own website (mariaosantopala.com / Apple Dentistry) names Dr. Maria Osan-Topala as the practicing/owning dentist at a single 2457 Ridge Rd address with a small team matching provider_count=2; no corporate parent or brand appears anywhere. T2 single-location dentist-owned group stands, high.

The ao_reaches_multiple_locations and shared_phone signals point to exactly one sibling (c8356b1274f05071), which is itself 'LEMONT FAMILY DENTAL LTD' at the same ZIP 60439, same phone (630) 257-8669, same website lemontfamilydental.com, same AO Dr. Jennifer Splitt-Krull. This is the identical single Lemont office appearing as two location rows (an address/suite variant), not two offices; it must not merge as a separate T1 unit.

shared_ein (363350286) and shared_website_domain (inspiredentalwellness.com) tie this address to a differently-named sibling practice (Gary Gunkel DDS), and web search confirms 14512 John Humphrey Dr (Solek's exact address, phone 708-460-6699) is now 'Inspire Dental Wellness' under Dr. Erica Zolnierczyk, with the original owner Solek retired (per his LinkedIn). Two acquired-and-rebranded practices sharing one EIN and brand is a consolidation pattern that could be a dentist T3 group or an MSO; ownership cannot be confirmed from directory-only evidence, so route to the adversarial verifier — never a clean single_loc_group under the retired Solek.

The org NPI's AO is Dr. Umang Patel (title OWNER) reaching 2 locations, with a shared phone across 2 locations; 'USP Clinical GPs PLLC' (USP = Umang S Patel) is his own professional entity. Web search confirms Patel is a practicing dentist (Northwestern DDS) who owns multiple offices — Palos Heights Family Dental and Romeoville Dental Center. This is a dentist-owned multi-location network (rule 6a), not a single location and not corporate/MSO; corrected to dentist_multi at medium confidence given branding confusion in the source evidence.

The practice's own site allsmilesworth.com is positive current proof that Dr. Theron Layer, DDS owns the single 'All Smiles' office at 11104 S Natoma Ave, Worth, with no DSO/PE/management language (provider_count=1). The ao_reaches_multiple_locations signal is explained as third-party aggregator (dentalplans.com) name-listing noise, and the shared phone is a stale 319 (Iowa) registration number, not an operational network line — both benign against the primary-source single-location ownership proof. T1 stands, high.

Two stealth-DSO indicators combine: an opaque location-LLC name ('DownersGroveCTD LLC', not the dentist's name) and a hard ao_nonclinical_exec_title where the authorized official Mitch Weiland is titled 'ASSISTANT CONTROLLER' — a multi-entity corporate-finance role that a solo/small practice does not have and that implies centralized MSO back-office filing. The researcher could not corroborate Weiland and only inferred a single-location Patelski practice from a bio page; the controller-title + generic-LLC pattern warrants the adversarial verifier rather than acceptance.

Clean T1 fails: the org-NPI OWNER (Dr. Miranda Albert, DDS) reaches 2 locations and is not the dentist who practices here (Dr. Sherif Albert per the researcher), and the shared phone spans 2 locations. The evidence is contradictory — either a husband/wife pair running two separate solo offices (a spouse-filer artifact) or a family-owned 2-location dentist group (T3) — and confidence is only medium with a name mismatch (M2 Dental vs Esplanade Dental Care). No corporate/DSO signal, so hold_unresolved rather than dso_verify; it cannot merge as clean true_independent.

The hard ao_nonclinical_exec_title signal is benign: CLAUDIA IBARRA (ADMINISTRATOR) is a non-clinical office-admin filer of the org NPI for a dentist-eponymous SC. The practice's own website (sarabanuelosdental.com) confirms Dr. Sara Banuelos runs the single 3800 Highland Ave, Suite 108 office for 20+ years with no franchise/parent; provider_count=2 supports single_loc_group and no shared-domain/multi-location signal fired. Tier stands, medium.
